# MTDT Agency (McWhorter-Thomasson Digital Technologies) - Full Documentation

> We build digital machines that accelerate human innovation through high-velocity React ecosystems and immutable backend pipelines.

## Founders
- **Matthew McWhorter**: Veteran software engineer specializing in complex digital systems.
- **Graham Thomasson**: Veteran software engineer specializing in scalable backend automation.

## Core Services

### 1. High-Velocity React Ecosystems
We build immutable frontend architectures and robust databases that eliminate bottlenecks and maximize performance.
- **Performance Marketing Site**: Blazing-fast, SEO-optimized static architecture designed to capture leads and convert. Includes High-Performance Next.js Build, Technical SEO & Core Web Vitals, Generative Engine Optimization (GEO). From $139/mo.
- **Headless Digital Storefront**: Omnichannel headless commerce with sub-second page loads engineered to maximize revenue. Includes Headless Next.js Commerce Architecture, Shopify/Stripe/PIM Integrations, Global Cart & Edge State Management, Programmatic Product Page SEO.
- **Custom Web Application**: Enterprise-grade full-stack engineering with scalable, immutable backend pipelines. Includes Modern React Server Components (RSC), Custom Database Architecture, Advanced Authentication & RBAC, Complex API Orchestration.

### 2. Immutable Backend Pipelines
Orchestrating secure, predictable, and fully automated data flows for mission-critical systems.
- Automated Workflows: Eliminate manual intervention with self-healing pipelines.
- Elastic Scaling: Dynamic resource allocation based on real-time telemetry.
- Security by Default: SOC2 compliant architectures with zero-trust protocols.

### 3. Technical Strategy & Performance Audits
Architectural consulting for high-growth technical teams navigating complex stacks. Deep-dive analytical reporting and optimization for mission-critical applications.
